title: CT13 9FP, Discovery Park Management Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/AP3438YK/V002
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Discovery Park Management Limited Installation name: Discovery Park Waste Water Treatment Facility Permit number: EPR/AP3438YK/V002  "
